queries.question: Show me the performances every festival has.
queries.sql: SELECT Performances.Type  from Festivals_Performances join Performances on Festivals_Performances.PerformanceID = Performances.PerformanceID join Festivals on Festivals_Performances.FestivalID = Festivals.FestivalID   GROUP BY Festivals_Performances.PerformanceID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Festivals_Performances.FestivalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Festivals)

queries.question: Show me the performances every festival has.
queries.sql: select festivals.name , performances.type from Festivals_Performances join Performances on Festivals_Performances.PerformanceID = Performances.PerformanceID join Festivals on Festivals_Performances.FestivalID = Festivals.FestivalID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?festivals_performances a :Festivals_Performances .
  ?performances a :Performance .
  ?festivals_performances p:hasPerformances ?performances .
  ?festivals a :Festivals .
  ?festivals_performances p:hasFestivals ?festivals .
  ?festivals p:name ?name .
  ?performances p:Type ?type .
}

queries.question: For each festival, show me the type and descriptions of performances at that festival
queries.sql: select festivals.name , performances.type , performances.description from Festivals_Performances join Performances on Festivals_Performances.PerformanceID = Performances.PerformanceID join Festivals on Festivals_Performances.FestivalID = Festivals.FestivalID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type ?description WHERE {
  ?festivals_performances a :Festivals_Performances .
  ?performances a :Performance .
  ?festivals_performances p:hasPerformances ?performances .
  ?festivals a :Festivals .
  ?festivals_performances p:hasFestivals ?festivals .
  ?festivals p:name ?name .
  ?performances p:Type ?type .
  ?performances p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: Provide me the performance types and descriptions that are common to all festivals
queries.sql: SELECT Performances.Type, Performances.Description  from Festivals_Performances join Performances on Festivals_Performances.PerformanceID = Performances.PerformanceID join Festivals on Festivals_Performances.FestivalID = Festivals.FestivalID   GROUP BY Festivals_Performances.PerformanceID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Festivals_Performances.FestivalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Festivals)

queries.question: List the performance descriptions shown for every festival.
queries.sql: SELECT Performances.Description  from Festivals_Performances join Performances on Festivals_Performances.PerformanceID = Performances.PerformanceID join Festivals on Festivals_Performances.FestivalID = Festivals.FestivalID   GROUP BY Festivals_Performances.PerformanceID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Festivals_Performances.FestivalID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Festivals)

queries.question: List the performance descriptions shown for every festival.
queries.sql: select festivals.name , performances.description from Festivals_Performances join Performances on Festivals_Performances.PerformanceID = Performances.PerformanceID join Festivals on Festivals_Performances.FestivalID = Festivals.FestivalID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?festivals_performances a :Festivals_Performances .
  ?performances a :Performance .
  ?festivals_performances p:hasPerformances ?performances .
  ?festivals a :Festivals .
  ?festivals_performances p:hasFestivals ?festivals .
  ?festivals p:name ?name .
  ?performances p:Description ?description .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What are the performance types and descriptions that we have for every festival
List the performance descriptions shown for every festival.
Show me the performances every festival has.
